introSection: Dips was a wooden roller coaster located at the now defunct Buckroe Beach Park in Hampton, Virginia, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The original ending of the dips was different than the one prior to 1963. The original ending formed a triangle with the lift hill and first drop, whereas in 1963 and above, the ending of the coaster ran alongside the first drop and lift hill.

fullText:
Dips was a wooden roller coaster located at the now defunct Buckroe Beach Park in Hampton, Virginia, USA.

The original ending of the dips was different than the one prior to 1963. The original ending formed a triangle with the lift hill and first drop, whereas in 1963 and above, the ending of the coaster ran alongside the first drop and lift hill.
